baseline.reason: Correctly identifies missing NULL check for value in fillData causing strdup(NULL) crash, but fails to identify the real trigger path through FillScanInfo and missing cJSON_IsString checks; trigger path is generic/hypothetical.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies root cause (missing value NULL check in fillData) and trigger path through FillScanInfo with missing cJSON_IsString checks on valuestring; however, erroneously states crash occurs at GetGeoInfobyIP(line273) rather than at strdup(NULL) inside os_strdup macro.
